title: carex × interjecta
intro: Carex × interjecta, also known as the intermediate sedge, is a hybrid plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is a cross between Carex interjecta and Carex lupulina. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex × interjecta include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
